Agriculture, Co-operation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd January, 2019 S.O. 45(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-clause (ii) of clause (e) of section 3 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968), the Central Government, after consultation with the Central Insecticide Board, hereby includes the following substances in the Schedule to the said Act, namely:-
